inputs.label: System Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost of solar system installation

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront cost of solar system installation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güneş enerjisi sistemi kurulumunun toplam peşin maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total initial de l'installation solaire.

inputs.label: Annual Production
inputs.businessContext: Estimated annual electricity generation from the solar system

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated annual electricity generation from the solar system
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güneş enerjisi sisteminden tahmini yıllık elektrik üretimi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Estimation de la production annuelle d'électricité du système solaire.
Prix actuel de l'électricité par kWh
Coût annuel de maintenance et d'exploitation

inputs.label: Tax Credit
inputs.businessContext: Applicable tax credit percentage (e.g., 26% federal ITC in the US)

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable tax credit percentage (e.g., 26% federal ITC in the US)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanabilir vergi kredisi yüzdesi (örneğin, ABD'de %26 federal ITC).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Steuergutschriftsprozentsatz (z. B. 26 % bundesstaatliche ITC in den USA)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de crédit d'impôt applicable (ex. 26% ITC fédéral aux États-Unis).

inputs.label: Degradation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual degradation rate of solar panels (e.g., 0.005 for 0.5%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual degradation rate of solar panels (e.g., 0.005 for 0.5%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güneş panellerinin yıllık bozunma oranı (örneğin, %0,5 için 0,005).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Degradationsrate der Solarmodule (z. B. 0,005 für 0,5 %)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de dégradation annuel des panneaux solaires (ex. 0,005 pour 0,5%).

inputs.label: Escalation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual electricity price escalation rate (e.g., 0.03 for 3%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual electricity price escalation rate (e.g., 0.03 for 3%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık elektrik fiyat artış oranı (örneğin, %3 için 0.03)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'augmentation annuelle du prix de l'électricité (ex. 0,03 pour 3%)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
